ST MARY MAGDALENE · PADDINGTON · LONDON W2
Arts, Culture
& Community

A multi-arts venue for everyone in Paddington — music, theatre, heritage, workshops and a canal-side café.

Featured This Season

What's On

Grand Junction offers a full programme of live music, theatre, classes and workshops, exhibitions, tours and talks, with something for all ages, local or visiting.

Community
Sat 18 Apr · 2pm – 5pm

Loved & Wanted Spring Festival

The whole community is invited to our fun-filled spring festival, celebrating Paddington's creativity, heritage and community spirit with live music, food and activities for all ages.

FreeFamilyAll Ages
Free
Live Music
Wed 10 Jun · 7.30pm

Poppy Ackroyd

The UK's most inventive pianist-composer makes her Grand Junction debut, sculpting delicate melodies, violin loops and inside-piano textures into immersive sonic worlds.

18+Licensed Bar
£21 + bf
Live Theatre
Wed 27 May · 11am & 2pm

Cinderella Ice Cream Seller

Join us this May half term for a delicious retelling of a fairytale classic with storytelling, stunning live music and theatrical magic. Ages 5+.

FamilyAge 5+
Pay What You Can
SEND
Fri 24 Jul · 6.30pm

VIP (Very Inclusive Party) Club Night

West London's newest inclusive club night, welcoming adults with learning disabilities and those without. Coloured lights, no strobes. A quiet space always available.

Accessible18+
£7 / Support workers free
Tours
Sat 25 Jul · 2pm – 3pm

Stone, Light & Colour

Explore the arts of St Mary Magdalene — discover the extraordinary Victorian neo-Gothic architecture, vibrant stained glass and nine centuries of stories.

All AgesWalk-ins Welcome
£5
Workshop
Every Tue · 1pm · from 10 Jun

Echoes of Us

A 10-week creative storytelling and memory-making journey workshop for African and Caribbean adults (18+) in Westbourne, Paddington and West London.

FreeAdults 18+
Free
Class
Every Mon · 20 Apr – 6 Jul · 11.45am

Language Café (English)

A friendly, welcoming session to meet local people, improve your English and gain confidence. A different topic each week. Everyone welcome.

FreeAdultsBeginners
Free
Always Here

Experience
Grand Junction

Heritage Hub

Nine Centuries of Stories to Discover

Explore the extraordinary building that is St Mary Magdalene — Norman origins, Victorian craftsmanship, Pre-Raphaelite windows and nine centuries of community life in Paddington.

  • Grade I listed neo-Gothic church
  • Guided heritage tours available
  • Interactive digital guide
  • Step-free access
Become Part of Our Community

Join Grand Junction

Become a part of something that matters. Your membership directly supports the arts, community programmes and the conservation of this remarkable building.

Support Us With a Donation

Not ready to join? A one-off gift directly funds our programme and community work.

The Café · Canal-Side

Coffee, Lunch & the Canal

Freshly made food and great coffee on the Regent's Canal terrace. A warm, welcoming space open to everyone — no event ticket required. We also cater for private hire.

OpenSaturday – Thursday · 9am – 4pm
Find usRowington Close, W2 · Regent's Canal side
Also offersPrivate hire & catering for events
